requirement: Enhance the admin bot to be a full AI admin and ops assistant — conversational ops commands, proactive alerts, scheduled health checks, and deep integration with all admin-ui pages via actionable bot responses

tasks.title: Ops command registry and executor in orchestrator
tasks.description:
Add an ops command system to the orchestrator that maps natural language to gateway API calls. Create src/admin-bot/orchestrator/src/ops-commands.ts with a registry of executable ops commands:

1. Define OpsCommand interface: { name, aliases[], description, params[], execute(args) → OpsResult }
2. Register commands: halt_instrument, resume_instrument, mass_cancel, trigger_margin_calc, trigger_settlement, approve_kyc, reject_kyc, set_participant_tier, create_instrument, update_instrument, halt_all, resume_all
3. Each command calls fetchGateway with the right endpoint, method, and body
4. Add parseOpsCommand(message: string) → { command, args } that extracts command + args from natural language (e.g., 'halt WHT-HRW-2026M07-UB' → halt_instrument with id)
5. Wire into handleSimple: when category is admin_action AND parseOpsCommand returns a match, execute it directly instead of returning navigation hints
6. Return OpsResult with { success, message, data?, confirmationRequired? } — for destructive ops (mass_cancel, halt_all) set confirmationRequired=true

Acceptance: 'halt WHT-HRW-2026M07-UB' executes halt via gateway instead of saying 'go to circuit breakers'. Tests for all command parse+execute paths.

tasks.title: Proactive alerts via scheduled health checks in orchestrator
tasks.description:
Add scheduled health monitoring to the orchestrator that surfaces issues proactively. Create src/admin-bot/orchestrator/src/health-monitor.ts:

1. HealthMonitor class with configurable check interval (default 60s via HEALTH_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS env)
2. On each tick: call fetchGateway('/api/v1/admin/health'), compare with previous state
3. Detect transitions: healthy→unhealthy (alert), unhealthy→healthy (recovery)
4. Maintain an alertQueue: Array<ProactiveAlert> with { type, service, message, timestamp, severity }
5. Add GET /alerts endpoint to api.ts that returns and drains the alert queue
6. Add alert types: service_down, service_recovered, high_margin_utilization (check /api/v1/margin/calls/stats, alert if participants_in_call > 0), aging_tickets (check /api/v1/tickets?status=open, alert if any >24h)
7. Export start/stop methods, wire into orchestrator index.ts

Acceptance: health monitor runs on interval, detects service transitions, exposes /alerts endpoint. Tests with mocked gateway responses.

tasks.title: Bot chat panel deep page integration and action execution
tasks.description:
Enhance the admin-ui BotChatPanel to execute actions inline and integrate deeply with each admin page.

1. In BotContext.tsx: add handleAction(action: Action) method that handles action types:
   - 'link': use React Router navigate() to go to the target page
   - 'api_call': call fetch(action.payload) with auth headers, show result in chat
   - 'confirm': show inline confirmation dialog before executing (for destructive ops)
2. In BotChatPanel.tsx: render action buttons on bot messages, wire onClick to handleAction
3. In BotMessageCard.tsx: add action button rendering with appropriate styles (link=blue, api_call=green, confirm=red border)
4. Add 'confirm' to Action type union in botApi.ts
5. Wire currentPage from React Router location.pathname into BotProvider so context is always current

Acceptance: clicking a 'link' action navigates to the page. Clicking 'api_call' executes and shows result. Tests for handleAction logic, action button rendering.

tasks.title: Alert badge and proactive notification in bot UI
tasks.description:
Add proactive alert polling to the admin-ui bot panel so admins see issues without asking.

1. In BotContext.tsx: add alert polling — every 30s call GET /bot/alerts (via botApi.ts), if alerts returned, auto-add them as bot messages with severity styling
2. In botApi.ts: add fetchAlerts() → ProactiveAlert[] function
3. In BotButton.tsx: show a red badge with alert count (separate from unread message count) when there are unacknowledged alerts
4. In BotChatPanel.tsx: render alert messages with severity-colored left border (red=critical, orange=warning, blue=info)
5. Add 'SET_ALERTS' action to BotReducer, track acknowledged vs unacknowledged alerts
6. Auto-open the bot panel when a critical alert arrives (new BotAction: 'AUTO_OPEN_CRITICAL')

Acceptance: alerts poll in background, show as bot messages, badge on button, auto-open on critical. Tests for alert polling logic, badge count, severity styling.

tasks.title: Conversational ops confirmation flow
tasks.description:
Add a confirmation flow for destructive operations in both orchestrator and UI.

1. In ops-commands.ts: commands with confirmationRequired=true return a pending confirmation response with a confirmation_token (random UUID)
2. In orchestrator api.ts: add POST /confirm endpoint that accepts { token, confirmed: boolean }
3. In orchestrator: maintain a Map<token, PendingOp> with TTL (5 min), execute on confirm, discard on deny/timeout
4. In BotContext.tsx: when bot response has confirmationRequired, show inline confirm/cancel buttons
5. In botApi.ts: add confirmAction(token: string, confirmed: boolean) function
6. In BotChatPanel: render confirmation card with op description, confirm (green) and cancel (red) buttons

Acceptance: 'mass cancel all orders' → bot asks 'Are you sure? This will cancel X orders' with confirm/cancel → confirm calls /confirm → result shown. Tests for token lifecycle, TTL expiry, confirm/deny paths.

tasks.title: Tests for ops commands, health monitor, and confirmation flow
tasks.description:
Write comprehensive tests for all new orchestrator functionality.

1. src/admin-bot/orchestrator/src/__tests__/ops-commands.test.ts:
   - Test parseOpsCommand for each registered command with various phrasings
   - Test execute for each command with mocked fetchGateway
   - Test confirmationRequired flag on destructive commands
   - Test unknown command returns null

2. src/admin-bot/orchestrator/src/__tests__/health-monitor.test.ts:
   - Test alert detection on healthy→unhealthy transition
   - Test recovery detection on unhealthy→healthy
   - Test alert queue drain via /alerts endpoint
   - Test high margin utilization alert
   - Test aging ticket alert
   - Test interval start/stop

3. src/admin-bot/orchestrator/src/__tests__/confirmation.test.ts:
   - Test token generation and storage
   - Test confirm execution
   - Test deny discards
   - Test TTL expiry

Acceptance: all tests pass, >80% coverage on new files.
